ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for client login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the client's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the client account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial investment amount for the portfolio */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the portfolio */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Risk profile of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that owns the account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the account */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account that made the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument traded */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the instrument traded */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the transaction */,
  "fees" REAL /* Additional fees associated with the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_transactions_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES instrument_sector ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_transactions_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES instrument_industry ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_transactions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instrument_types ("instrument_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_transactions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES instrument_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument for which the data is provided */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the instrument at the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument traded at the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "change" REAL /* Price change from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the market data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument FOREIGN KEY ("instrument") REFERENCES instrument_types ("instrument_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio for which the metric is calculated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "equity" REAL /* Equity of the portfolio at the given date */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used by the portfolio at the given date */,
  "sum_value_of_positions" REAL /* Sum value of positions in the portfolio at the given date */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Return rate of the portfolio */,
  "risk_free_rate" REAL /* Risk-free rate used in performance calculations */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the portfolio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics metric */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio for which the metric is calculated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the metric */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the analytics metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "instrument_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "instrument_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the instrument type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the instrument type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the exchange was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the industry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk metric */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio for which the metric is calculated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level used in risk calculations */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the risk metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the risk metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the risk metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
